name: AWS CloudTrail
description: AWS service for governance, compliance, operational auditing, and risk auditing by logging API calls and events across AWS infrastructure

actions.name: Lookup Events
actions.description: Look up management events or CloudTrail Insights events captured by CloudTrail

parameters.name: StartTime
parameters.description: Start of the event time range in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: EndTime
parameters.description: End of the event time range in ISO 8601 format

actions.name: Describe Trails
actions.description: Retrieve settings for one or more trails, including trail configuration and logging status

parameters.name: trailNameList
parameters.description: Array of trail names or ARNs to describe (empty returns all trails)

parameters.name: includeShadowTrails
parameters.description: Include organization trails not created in this account

actions.name: Get Trail Status
actions.description: Get the current status of a trail including whether logging is enabled

actions.name: List Trails
actions.description: List trails associated with the current region for the account

actions.name: Get Event Selectors
actions.description: Retrieve event selectors configured for a trail including management and data events

actions.name: Get Insight Selectors
actions.description: Retrieve insight selectors configured for a trail for anomaly detection
